analysis: The project contains a website focused on black holes with an existing dark, cosmic theme. The current UI includes animated slides, black hole visuals, and swirling effects. The theme is already aligned with the topic of black holes, but there is room for improvement in enhancing the animations and interactive elements to make the experience more immersive. The existing files suggest a focus on visual storytelling and interactivity, which can be further enriched with more dynamic animations and cohesive design elements.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more dynamic animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions to create a more immersive cosmic experience.

Improve the JavaScript to add more interactive features, such as hover effects on black hole elements, smooth scrolling for animated slides, and interactive tooltips for educational content about black holes.

Update the HTML structure to include additional sections for interactive elements, such as a gallery of black hole images, a timeline of black hole discoveries, and a quiz section to engage users with the topic.
